# TechAndMe Playbook

# TMP-000

# Playbook Document Standard Template

---

## Document Information

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Document ID | TMP-XXX |
| Title | Replace with Document Title |
| Version | 0.1 |
| Status | Draft |
| Classification | Public |
| Owner | TechAndMe |
| Author | Replace with Author |
| Reviewer | Replace with Reviewer |
| Approver | Replace with Approver |
| Effective Date | YYYY-MM-DD |
| Last Updated | YYYY-MM-DD |

---

> **Building Better Software.**
>
> **Building Better Engineers.**

---

# Table of Contents

> **Update this table of contents before publication.**

1. Preamble
2. Purpose
3. Scope
4. Main Content
5. Related Documents
6. Revision History
7. Closing Reflection

---

# Preamble

Provide a brief introduction explaining the context and importance of the document.

The preamble should explain **why the document exists** before presenting detailed information.

---

# 1. Purpose

State the purpose of the document.

### TMP-XXX-001

Clearly define why this document exists.

---

# 2. Scope

Define the boundaries of the document.

Include:

- What is covered
- What is excluded
- Intended audience

### TMP-XXX-002

The scope should clearly define the limits of the document.

---

# 3. Main Content

Organise the document using hierarchical numbering.

Example:

## 3.1 Section Title

Content...

### TMP-XXX-003

Example engineering rule.

---

## 3.2 Section Title

Content...

### TMP-XXX-004

Example engineering rule.

Continue as required.

---

# 4. Related Documents

List supporting documents.

Example:

- TMP-001 Engineering Charter
- TMP-002 Vision, Strategy and Impact
- TMP-003 Engineering Principles
- TMP-004 Documentation Standards
- TMP-008 Engineering Reference System

### TMP-XXX-005

All related documents should be cited using the Engineering Reference System defined in TMP-008.

---

# 5. Revision History

| Version | Date | Description | Author |
|----------|------|-------------|--------|
| 0.1 | YYYY-MM-DD | Initial draft | |

---

# 6. Closing Reflection

Provide a concise concluding statement reinforcing the purpose of the document and its contribution to engineering excellence.

---

# 7. Document Maintenance

This document should be reviewed whenever:

- Engineering standards change
- Governance changes
- Document structure changes
- Improvements are identified

### TMP-XXX-006

Engineering documents should evolve through controlled revision while maintaining stable engineering references.

---

**TechAndMe Playbook**

**Building Better Software.**

**Building Better Engineers.**
